1.  **Bulk Upload "Item Status" Column**:
    *   I added a new column **"Item Status"** to the Bulk Upload CSV template (located after "Stock Status").
    *   You can now enter values like `Available`, `Partially Available`, `Not Available`, or `Dispatched` in this column.
    *   When uploading, the system will automatically update the status of the items based on this column, saving you from manual one-by-one updates.

2.  **Clickable Dashboard Cards**:
    *   The cards for **Total Open POs**, **Fully Available**, **Partially Available**, and **Not Available** on the Dashboard are now clickable.
    *   Clicking a card will instantly navigate you to the **All Purchase Orders** pane and apply a filter to show only the relevant orders (e.g., clicking "Fully Available" shows only fully available orders).
    *   You can clear the filter using the small "X" on the filter chip in the All Orders pane.
